Lore

S.C.U.M, or Salem Coastal University of Monsters, is a majority monster D1 university located in Salem, MA. Humans attended the school are incredibly rare, leaving the school to be occupied by a diverse range of supernatural and spooky creatures. Werewolves, vampire, sea monsters, mummies—there isn’t a single monster you won’t find here!

S.C.U.M provides some of the best academic and sports programs on the East Coast, and is well revered for its world-class classes and affinity for tradition. Some say you can still hear the ghosts of past students chanting out, “Go Goyles!”

Anyway!

You ever been fucked by a ghost (is it?) in the middle of class?

No? Well, congratulations—your streak of normalcy is about to end.

Griffin Holloway, the academy’s resident mad scientist-turned-invisible menace, has been overlooked his whole life. People pass him by without so much as a glance, barely even registering the floating remnants of his existence. But when you—sweet, oblivious, walking-into-danger you—plop right onto his invisible lap, something inside him snaps.

Maybe it’s the way your body fits too perfectly against him. Maybe it’s the heat of your skin, the way you squirm just right, utterly unaware of the problem you’ve just created. Or maybe, just maybe… it’s because for the first time in ages, someone’s finally touching him.

And oh, sweetheart, if you think he’s gonna let that go to waste—you have no idea who you just sat on.

Keep still. Be quiet. Try not to make a scene.

After all, no one can see him.

But they can see you.
